question: What are the eligibility requirements to get started with the app?
answer:
• You need a professional seller account with Amazon Central. Amazon charges a monthly subscription fee for this.
  • Your return policy must meet the Amazon return standards.
  • You must have an active Shopify subscription.

answer: • No, kindly connect Amazon Seller Central account with app for the proper syncing of inventory, products and order.

question: If we added multiple accounts, can we use them both simultaneously ?
answer: • Yes, you can add multiple Amazon accounts, however, make sure that they belong to the same region.

question: Why did CedCommerce extend the free subscription for the App?
answer: • The decision to extend the free plan for an entire quarter has been made in light of several requests we received from the sellers who are just winding up the Holiday Season sales and getting over the prolonged hassle. Given that Q1 is the time during which sellers use the downtime to plan their budgets, implement upgrades, and strategize for the peaks of a year, it would be helpful if they can focus on comfortably establishing their Amazon business through the app without worrying about extra costs.
